name: Yum-a-Setta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Can cream of chicken soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger with salt, pepper, and brown sugar in a pan until no longer pink.
2. Add chopped onion to the pan and cook until softened.
3. Stir in tomato soup.
4. Cook egg noodles separately until al dente, then drain.
5. Mix in cream of chicken soup.
6. Combine the hamburger mixture and noodle mixture in a 2-quart casserole dish, layering with processed cheese between each layer.
7. Cover the dish and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
